# PHIL.076 ? Feminism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** feminism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Gender analysis; critique of patriarchy; situated knowledge; intersectionality; care ethics; equality and justice

## Application
Analyze gender dynamics; critique male-centered assumptions; recognize situated perspectives; intersectional analysis; ethics of care

## Key Values
- Gender equality
- Patriarchy critique
- Situated knowledge
- Care
